source: When we look at adult problem-solving skills , two things stand out : motivation and consequences . The motivation is why they have to go to work . They have to feed their family , they have to feed themselves . They work harder to have a nicer car , nicer clothes , to go out at night . These are motivations . The consequences are if they do n't get up and go to work , they lose their job . Over time , they lose many jobs and they wind up in trouble socially and economically .

source: The Treasury announced on Christmas Eve , and therefore buried , the news that it will give blank checks to Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac for the next three years . In essence , the Treasury ( meaning you ) will pay the tab whenever Fannie or Freddie needs fresh capital . Rather than padlock these failed institutions and auction their parts , Treasury is weighing new cost estimates as high as $400 billion .

source: The role of the United Nations is so very important to the future global community . With problems in the Untied Nations and around the world becoming so more complex . As major changes have to happen around the world so they must at the United Nations . Example ; United Nations Security Council Veto Vote Resolution 1385 on Saturday December 29 , 2001 . One nation or one person should not have so much power to be able to stop such a resolution in secret . With only one being out of sync with the others an amendment to the resolution would have been in order . The UN Security Council being the high Council of the UN with the one vote veto you are creating a dictatorial buricaticy on a global level . Giving any one of the Permanent Nations absolute power in being able to stop any resolution they desire .
domestication: 联合国对于未来全球社会的作用至关重要。随着联合国和世界各地的问题变得愈发复杂，世界必须发生重大变革，联合国也不例外。比如，2001年12月29日星期六，联合国安理会通过的第1385号决议的否决投票。一个国家或一个人不应该有这么大的权力，能在暗中阻止这样的决议。只要有一国与其他国家不一致，就应当对决议进行修改。联合国安理会作为联合国的最高理事会，一票否决制实际上是在全球层面上创造了一个独裁的官僚体制，让任何一个常任理事国都能随心所欲地阻止任何决议。
foreignization: 联合国在未来的全球社会中的作用非常重要。随着联合国和世界各地的问题变得越来越复杂。当世界范围内必须发生重大变化时，联合国也必须如此。例如：2001年12月29日星期六的联合国安理会否决权决议1385。一个国家或一个人不应该有如此大的权力能够在秘密中阻止这样的决议。如果只有一个国家与其他人不同步，就应该对决议进行修正。作为联合国的最高理事会，联合国安理会的一票否决权正在创建一个全球层面的独裁官僚制度。给予任何一个常任理事国绝对的权力，能够阻止他们想要阻止的任何决议。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The role of the United Nations is so very important to the future global community . With problems in the Untied Nations and around the world becoming so more complex . As major changes have to happen around the world so they must at the United Nations . Example ; United Nations Security Council Veto Vote Resolution 1385 on Saturday December 29 , 2001 . One nation or one person should not have so much power to be able to stop such a resolution in secret . With only one being out of sync with the others an amendment to the resolution would have been in order . The UN Security Council being the high Council of the UN with the one vote veto you are creating a dictatorial buricaticy on a global level . Giving any one of the Permanent Nations absolute power in being able to stop any resolution they desire .

source: When there is a culture of secrecy within a closed group , information generated in and by those individuals can be kept within the confines of the group . This behavior may lead to public harm if a closed group keeps secret information that negatively affects other individuals who are not group members . When a public harm is a possibility , the group must install transparency so as to prevent that harm . While complete transparency might be extremely difficult , there does need to be some concession to candor and accountability . Lawyers , like many other professional groups , are commonly thought of as a closed group . We , like those in other groups , must be vigilant to maintain some transparency . In doing so , we protect and uphold the integrity of our profession while preventing harm to our clients and other citizens . This need for transparency is best illustrated through examples .

source: The United States linked the question of indemnization for U.S. copper companies with Chile 's multilateral foreign debt . That foreign debt , an inheritance from the obligations incurred by the Alessandri and Frei governments , was the second highest foreign debt per capita of any country in the world . Yet , in the 1972 and 1973 Paris Club foreign debt negotiations with Chile 's principal foreign creditor nations , the United States alone refused to consider rescheduling Chile 's foreign payments until there was movement toward indemnization for the U.S. copper companies . The United States also exerted pressure on each of the other foreign creditor nations not to renegotiate Chile 's foreign debt as a group .
domestication: 美国把赔偿美国铜公司的问题跟智利的多边外债捆绑在了一起。这笔外债是继承自阿莱桑德里和弗雷政府时期欠下的债务，人均外债数额居全球第二。然而，在1972年和1973年的巴黎俱乐部外债谈判中，面对智利的主要外国债权国时，唯有美国坚持不重新安排智利的外债偿还，除非智利在赔偿美国铜公司的问题上有所进展。美国还对其他外国债权国施压，不让它们集体与智利重新谈判外债问题。

Well , if guilt springs to mind when we think of prayer , why should we let prayer come to mind ? Keep the guilt at bay . Fend it off . We respond to guilt in two main ways : Action , to assuage our conscience , or inaction , to deny guilt 's entry into our conscience . Make up for the guilt or try to make off without it .
嗯，要是一想到祈祷就感到内疚，那为什么还要让祈祷出现在我们的脑海里呢？得把这内疚感挡在门外，不让它靠近。面对内疚，我们通常有两种反应：一种是采取行动，以求心安；另一种则是什么都不做，拒绝承认内心的内疚。要么弥补过错，要么尽量逃避内疚。

source: Although it certainly can feel a bit cornball at times , I also really liked " Warrior " and was a bit shocked that it bombed at the box office despite the good reviews and positive word of mouth . A photoresist film is formed on each of the simulation wafers under the same conditions as those for the wafer to be treated , and exposure for circuit patterning and other processes are effected . source: Glen Murakami of Teen Titans fame is ( in ) famous for not caring about the finer points that get the Fandom up in arms . The Shrug of God is the official answer to anything related to whether or not it 's in continuity with the other DCAU cartoons , anything to do with the characters ' origins or out-of-costume lives ( most famously , which Robin it is ) , and pretty much anything not detailed onscreen . General fan consensus is that Teen Titans is n't part of the DCAU and Robin is Dick Grayson , but The Powers That Be have never answered yes or no , not considering these things to be important .
domestication: 因为《少年泰坦》而出名的格伦·穆拉卡米，以不在乎粉丝们热议的细节而闻名。对于是否与DC动画宇宙中的其他卡通保持连贯，角色的起源或日常生活（最著名的例子就是哪一位罗宾），以及几乎所有屏幕上没有详细展示的内容，官方的答案都是“无所谓的态度”。粉丝们普遍认为，《少年泰坦》不属于DC动画宇宙，罗宾是迪克·格雷森，但官方从未明确回答过这些问题，认为这些都不重要。
foreignization: 因《少年泰坦》而著名的格伦·村上以其对那些让粉丝群体激动不已的细节毫不在意而闻名。对于任何与其它DCAU动画是否连续、角色的起源或非装扮生活（最著名的是，是哪个罗宾）相关的问题，以及几乎所有未在屏幕上详细描述的内容，官方答案都是“上帝的耸肩”。普遍的粉丝共识是，《少年泰坦》不属于DCAU，罗宾是迪克·格雷森，但高层从未给出肯定或否定的回答，他们认为这些事情并不重要。

source: As far as providers go , I 'm talking about the 4 main providers , Verizon , AT &T,; T-Mobile , Metro PCS , and Sprint . Tell me what you think about yours- is it great , sh*tty , too expensive , etc . I have Verizon . I can really only vouch for cell phone coverage since I have Charter for interwebz , home phone , and cable , but as far as cell phone coverage goes , Verizon is great . the coverage is great , and it 's not too costly ( although I do n't have a smartphone to pay for ) . Customer care is pretty easy to deal with too . Overall , they 're a great provider . Now tell me what you think . Also , can someone add Sprint to the poll ? I left that one out the first time .  Re : What do you think of your provider ?
domestication:

source: If you picked the Opportunity Scholarship Program as controversial , you 're right . The OSP has been under attack ever since its initial enactment , and every yearly reauthorization has come with a fight . The Obama administration has staked out a position that " the Federal Government should focus its attention and available resources on improving the quality of public schools for all students . " Education Secretary Arne Duncan recently commented that " we remain convinced that our time and resources are best spent on reforming the public school system to benefit all students . "

source: The adoption of the Universal Declaration of Human Rights on December 10 , 1948 constituted a step forward in the slow progress towards protection of human rights . The overarching principle of the UD is universality . Its provisions have equal standing . There are no moral grounds for self-serving " relativism , " which selects for convenience ; still less for the particularly ugly form of relativism that converts the UD into a weapon to wield selectively against designated enemies .
domestication: 1948年12月10日，《世界人权宣言》的通过标志着人权保护漫长道路上的一大步。《宣言》的核心原则是普遍性，各项条款地位平等。没有道德依据支持那种自利的“相对主义”，这种相对主义随意挑选对自己有利的内容；更不能容忍那种特别丑陋的相对主义，它将《宣言》变成了一种武器，选择性地针对特定的敌人。

source: Victor does n't believe geo-engineering will solve anything by itself , but he expects that ultimately we will have a cocktail of solutions . Perhaps we could start with a few puffs of sulfur in the atmosphere to buy time , then forests of plankton in the ocean , and then genetically engineered carbon-hungry trees . What is n't an option , Victor says , is refusing to fund more research , in the hope that geo-engineering wo n't be needed .

source: I married into a pink bathroom ! With the hidious mint green and floral wallpaper border it was obvious someone was more in tune to the 70 ? s and I 'll admit I was not a fan . However , with much thought and procrastination I 'm slowly transforming it . I hope to have a clean slate so that I can decorate and redecorate as I see fit with minimal effort , but also , if we sell this house , someone else wo n't be stuck with an awful bathroom . It 's one of the rooms in the house which everyone sees and since it 's our only bathroom I intend to not be overwhelmingly feminine ! I shall fight the urge , but keep the pink !
domestication: 我嫁进来时，浴室是粉红色的！墙上还贴着恶心的薄荷绿和花边壁纸，一看就知道这风格是70年代的。说实话，我实在不喜欢。不过，经过深思熟虑，加上拖延症发作，我开始慢慢改造它了。我希望最终能有个干净的底子，这样我可以随心所欲地装饰，不用费太大劲，而且如果将来卖房子，别人也不会摊上个糟糕的浴室。这个浴室是家里每个来客都会看到的地方，而且还是我们唯一的卫生间，我可不想让它显得过于女性化！我要克制自己，但保留那抹粉色！

source: We have a right to competent , honest lawyers in government . ( I know several and they are very intelligent , decent people ; I can not judge their expertise . ) We also have a right to pay for only one legal position from our government . Currently we often pay for both plaintiff and defendant . Thus my solution would be to cut the DoJ budget in half , every year , compounded , until the top echelons got their act together . In the private sector this is common , and effective . When Mr. Perez is terminated , loses his house in foreclosure ; it will flavor his legal theories .
domestication: 我们有权要求政府提供称职且诚实的律师。（我认识几个这样的律师，他们既聪明又正派；至于他们的专业水平如何，我就不好评判了。）我们也有权只为一个法律职位买单。但现在的情况是，我们经常要支付原告和被告双方的费用。所以我的建议是逐年削减司法部预算的一半，直到高层能拿出实际行动。在私营部门，这种做法很常见，也十分有效。等到佩雷斯先生被解雇，房子也被银行收回时，他的法律理论恐怕也要变味了。

source: Established in 1813 , the House Judiciary Committee is the second oldest standing committee in Congress . Its jurisdiction often places it at the center of American politics , such as when it approved the U.S.A. PATRIOT Act following the terrorist attacks on September 11 , 2001 . Particularly important today is the Committee 's oversight responsibility for the Departments of Justice and Homeland Security .

source: This is a tale of two stories . The first story was an article your humble correspondent read in today 's Miami Herald . The news could n't be better for Mitt Romney because it reported that the Miami Herald/El Nuevo Herald poll of likely voters showed the former Massachusetts governor leading Barack Obama in Florida by a comfortable 51 to 45 margin . However in the same edition of the Miami Herald there is also an Associated Press story stating that Obama " seems " to be leading in early polls in key states . Based on what ? Apparently based on pixie dust since virtually no real proof is offered .
domestication: 这是一则双城记。头一个故事是你家小编今天在《迈阿密先驱报》上看到的一篇文章。对米特·罗姆尼来说，这简直是天大的好消息，因为报纸上说，《迈阿密先驱报》和《新 Herald 报》联合做的民调显示，这位前马萨诸塞州州长在佛罗里达的支持率以51比45遥遥领先于奥巴马。可偏偏在同一期的《迈阿密先驱报》上，还有一篇美联社的文章，说什么奥巴马“似乎”在几个关键州的早期民调中领先。这又是凭啥呢？看样子是靠的仙尘魔法，因为文章几乎没拿出什么真凭实据来。

source: " Winner of JournalStone 's horror novel writing contest , Brett J. Talley has written a wonderful homage to occult horror . Each of the stories told to our protagonist is unique and scary by itself while adding to the overall atmosphere and theme of the novel as a whole . Each character is nicely fleshed-out and their individual stories come together beautifully . With references to Lovecraft , Stoker and even the Bible , That Which Should Not Be reads like the best 19th and early 20th century horror stories about the occult and ancient god-like monsters . I look forward to reading more by Talley in the future . Highly recommended . " - Colleen Wanglund , Monster Librarian
domestication: 布雷特·J·塔利赢得了JournalStone恐怖小说写作比赛，他写了一部向神秘恐怖致敬的精彩之作。每个讲给主角的故事都自成一体，既独特又吓人，同时又为整部小说的氛围和主题添砖加瓦。每个角色都塑造得栩栩如生，他们的故事交织在一起，美不胜收。书中还引用了洛夫克拉夫特、斯托克甚至《圣经》的内容，《不可言说之物》读起来就像是19世纪和20世纪早期最好的关于神秘力量和古老神灵的恐怖故事。我期待未来能读到更多塔利的作品。强烈推荐。——柯琳·汪伦德，怪物图书馆馆长
foreignization: “《JournalStone》恐怖小说写作比赛的获奖者布雷特·J·塔利撰写了一部精彩的神秘恐怖致敬之作。每个讲给主人公的故事本身都是独特且令人恐惧的，同时增加了整部小说的整体氛围和主题。每个角色都被描绘得栩栩如生，他们的个人故事也完美地融合在一起。书中引用了洛夫克拉夫特、斯托克甚至《圣经》，《不应存在的事物》读起来就像最好的19世纪和20世纪早期关于神秘和古代神灵般的怪物的恐怖故事。我期待未来能阅读更多塔利的作品。强烈推荐。” ——科琳·汪伦德，怪物图书馆管理员

" Winner of JournalStone 's horror novel writing contest , Brett J. Talley has written a wonderful homage to occult horror . Each of the stories told to our protagonist is unique and scary by itself while adding to the overall atmosphere and theme of the novel as a whole . Each character is nicely fleshed-out and their individual stories come together beautifully . With references to Lovecraft , Stoker and even the Bible , That Which Should Not Be reads like the best 19th and early 20th century horror stories about the occult and ancient god-like monsters . I look forward to reading more by Talley in the future . Highly recommended . " - Colleen Wanglund , Monster Librarian

“《JournalStone》恐怖小说写作比赛的获奖者布雷特·J·塔利撰写了一部精彩的神秘恐怖致敬之作。每个讲给主人公的故事本身都是独特且令人恐惧的，同时增加了整部小说的整体氛围和主题。每个角色都被描绘得栩栩如生，他们的个人故事也完美地融合在一起。书中引用了洛夫克拉夫特、斯托克甚至《圣经》，《不应存在的事物》读起来就像最好的19世纪和20世纪早期关于神秘和古代神灵般的怪物的恐怖故事。我期待未来能阅读更多塔利的作品。强烈推荐。” ——科琳·汪伦德，怪物图书馆管理员
